title: P1-4 archive-as-truth narrative (docs + bootstrap)
description: Make docs/onboarding and bootstrap state that pending→review is the only path to canonical, and that archive (not chat memory) is the durable truth lifecycle.
action: Update docs/USER-QUICKSTART.md and docs/KNOWLEDGE-MATURITY.md with an explicit archive-as-truth section: local evidence → fab_propose pending → fabric-review approve → canonical; never auto-promote chat/logs to canonical. Add a short bootstrap narrative bullet in packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts (ZH+EN) without expanding bootstrap into a full manual.

criteria: docs/USER-QUICKSTART.md contains the exact lifecycle phrase path including `fab_propose` and `fabric-review` (or `/fabric-review`) and states pending is required before canonical
docs/KNOWLEDGE-MATURITY.md states that maturity promotion is human/review-gated (no default LLM bulk auto-promote) and references pending→canonical review path
packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts ZH and EN mention pending→review (or fabric-review / fab_review) as the only path into canonical store
rg -n 'auto-promot|自动 promote|mem0' docs/USER-QUICKSTART.md docs/KNOWLEDGE-MATURITY.md returns no endorsement of auto-promote into canonical
convergence.verification: rg -n 'pending|canonical|fab_propose|fabric-review|archive' docs/USER-QUICKSTART.md docs/KNOWLEDGE-MATURITY.md packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts; pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test -- bootstrap-canonical bootstrap-parity
convergence.definition_of_done: Onboarding docs + bootstrap clearly teach archive-as-truth and pending→review-only canonical writes.

files.change: Expand existing evidence→pending→review→canonical diagram into archive-as-truth narrative; list non-goals (no mem0-style auto memory into canonical)
Clarify draft/verified/proven are review judgments after pending approval; reinforce no bulk auto-promote
One-line archive-as-truth: pending via fab_propose + fabric-review is the only path to canonical (ZH+EN)
Assert bootstrap text mentions pending and review/canonical path

implementation: Read existing USER-QUICKSTART lifecycle lines (~33-38) and strengthen archive-as-truth wording without rewriting the whole guide
Add a short 'Archive as truth' subsection if missing; keep multi-repo dogfood as mainline (do not replace)
Update KNOWLEDGE-MATURITY promotion table notes to stress pending approve path for new entries
Add lean bootstrap bullets; avoid duplicating full docs into AGENTS.md template
Run bootstrap parity tests after ZH/EN edits

reference.pattern: Existing USER-QUICKSTART lifecycle diagram + KNOWLEDGE-MATURITY axis
reference.examples: USER-QUICKSTART already has: local evidence → fab_propose pending → fabric-review → canonical store

rationale.chosen_approach: Narrative micro-transfer only — no engine change; depends on TASK-001 so bootstrap edits land after pre-action checklist structure.
rationale.tradeoffs: Docs-only impact is softer than code gates — acceptable for P1 narrative

risks: Conflict with TASK-001 bootstrap edits — depends_on TASK-001 to serialize
